creator: zleslie@freebsd.org
text: I am seeing this also.  If the `daemon` command is executed outside of `/root`, everything seems to run correctly.  Perhaps a code release in grafana upstream has started trying to read the local directory.  I've built up a new jail to confirm this is an issue outside of the first instance that I observed this.  I've messaged the maintainer on the subject as well, but have not heard back yet.
